title: Diagnose an oversell
description: Trace concurrent checkouts on a SKU to find the non-atomic check-then-decrement gap.
body: Steps: 1. Reproduce with concurrent checkouts on a single low-stock SKU. 2. Trace the availability check and the decrement and confirm whether they are one atomic step. 3. Look for a read-then-write gap or a missing row lock. 4. Replace it with an atomic conditional decrement or serialized reservation. 5. Re-run the concurrent test and confirm no oversell. Rollback point: before changing the reservation path under live traffic. Validation: sold-plus-reserved never exceeds on-hand under load.
